sources.title: The Legend Of Hell House 1973
sources.description: A physicist, his wife and two mediums are hired to investigate a house, where 27 guests had inexplicably died in 1927, along with most of a team of paranormal investigators in the early 1950s

metadata.Plot: A physicist, his wife and two mediums are hired to investigate the Belasco House, where 27 guests had inexplicably died in 1927, along with most of a team of paranormal investigators that was sent in the early 1950s.
metadata.Actors: Roddy McDowall, Gayle Hunnicutt, Pamela Franklin
